video_player.title: VIDEO LIBRARY
video_player.video_description: A comprehensive technical walkthrough on proper physical asset placement within standard 42U server racks. Covers rail mounting, U-space allocation, weight distribution protocols, and airflow clearance requirements per ASHRAE guidelines. Required viewing for all Tier 3 certified field engineers.
